briefing: Markets were flat to slightly negative today (NASDAQ -0.3%, S&P500 +0.0%) with no clear risk-on signal. Rather than force capital to work, only NG met the full multi-signal bar including a volume surge, so we added a modest position there and held the rest of the portfolio unchanged.

daily_lesson.explanation_en: Volume confirmation means checking that a price move is backed by higher-than-usual trading activity, which suggests real institutional interest rather than a random blip. A stock can look technically bullish on price alone, but without a volume surge, the signal is weaker and less trustworthy. Today, that distinction was the deciding factor between an otherwise similar set of bullish candidates.
daily_lesson.explanation_zh: 成交量確認是指觀察價格變動是否伴隨著高於平常的交易量，這代表背後有實質的機構買盤支撐，而非偶然的價格波動。一檔股票單看價格可能呈現技術面看漲，但若缺乏成交量放大確認，訊號的可信度就會降低。今日在多個技術面相似的看漲候選股中，這正是決定是否進場的關鍵因素。

market_education.summary_en: Major indices traded essentially flat today, with the NASDAQ dipping 0.3% and the S&P 500 unchanged, reflecting a lack of strong directional conviction among investors. Without a clear catalyst pushing markets higher or lower, trading stayed range-bound and cautious. This kind of quiet, low-volatility session often precedes a bigger move once new information arrives.
market_education.summary_zh: 今日大盤走勢大致持平，納斯達克指數微跌0.3%，標普500指數則持平收盤，反映投資人缺乏明確方向的信心。市場在缺乏強力催化因素的情況下呈現區間震盪、觀望氣氛濃厚。這種低波動的平靜盤整，往往是醞釀下一波較大行情的前奏。

trades.reasoning: Only top-scoring candidate with full four-signal confirmation (bullish RSI, MACD crossover, price above SMA-20, and volume surge), justifying a selective buy despite a neutral broader market.
